problem id: e9f53408
category: bit_manipulation

rule: I XOR NOT

examples:
  10011001 -> 11111111
  10000111 -> 11111111
  00111011 -> 11111111
  10100100 -> 11111111
  11111000 -> 11111111
  01100110 -> 11111111
  11011011 -> 11111111
  01100111 -> 11111111
  00111000 -> 11111111
  00111110 -> 11111111

query: 00001100
predicted answer: 11111111
